title: First patients enrolled in record-breaking Ebola treatment trial in DRC - The Guardian
summary_full: First patients enrolled in record-breaking Ebola treatment trial in DRC  The GuardianThere's no treatment designed for the Ebola strain ravaging DRC. But now there's hope  NPRResidents in eastern Congo cling to hope as a new Ebola treatment trial begins  AP NewsHealth workers interact at the Evangelical Medical Center, in Bunia, eastern Congo, on July 3, where Ebola clinical trials are scheduled to take place.  Sandusky RegisterEbola Trials  goSkagit
